creator: mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
On Tuesday 20 October 2009 14:42:33 itetcu@freebsd.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] databases/postgis: enhancements and fix NOPORTDOCS build
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->open

> State-Changed-Why:
> Maintainer has approved.
>

Actually, to whoever commits it, please flip DOCS_DFLT logic. Just noticed 
that it says .if defined(NOPORTDOCS), should be .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS).
-- 
Mel
